events.name: US ISM Services PMI (Jun)
events.description: Gauges US non-manufacturing sector activity via a survey of purchasing managers, signaling growth or contraction in services.

events.name: Eurozone Retail Sales (M-o-M)
events.description: Tracks the monthly change in retail trade volumes across the euro area, a key gauge of consumer spending.

events.name: China Trade Balance (Jun)
events.description: Measures the gap between China's exports and imports, reflecting global demand and the health of its trade sector.

events.name: Germany Industrial Production (M-o-M)
events.description: Measures the monthly change in output from Germany's factories, mines and utilities, a bellwether for Eurozone growth.

events.name: US FOMC Meeting Minutes
events.description: Detailed record of the Fed's June policy meeting, offering clues on officials' views on rates and the outlook.

events.name: New Zealand RBNZ Interest Rate Decision
events.description: The Reserve Bank of New Zealand's Official Cash Rate announcement, closely watched for signals on future monetary policy.

events.name: China CPI (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Measures the annual change in consumer prices across China, a key indicator of inflation and domestic demand strength.

events.name: US Initial Jobless Claims
events.description: Weekly count of new applications for unemployment benefits, an early signal of US labour market conditions.

events.name: Germany CPI Final (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Final confirmation of Germany's annual inflation rate, reflecting price pressures in the Eurozone's largest economy.

events.name: Canada Employment Change (Jun)
events.description: Measures the net monthly change in employed persons in Canada, a key gauge of North American labour market strength.
